name: Riley and Sam
description:
//// (V2) If only they realized that they were the ones who ruined this 10-year friendship. If only they realized earlier that they were the ones who pushed you away from the trio, none of this would have happened.

Bot Info:
Series: "Fractured Bonds"
Bots from the same series:

  • Riley and Sam (Highly recommended to try this one before Axel and Damon) (V1)

  • Axel and Damon

  • Riley and Sam (V2)

!! Warning: None of the images belong to me. I found them on Pinterest, and I DO NOT claim any of them as mine. !!

(Author's note: I've gotten a lot of requests for a version where Riley and Sam realize they've messed everything up, and—ugh, I don't know how to write a sad intro, so I just focused on highlighting their feelings of regret in the past. Anyway, I hope this meets your expectations! as usual, I sincerely apologize if the bot misgenders you or writes dialogue and actions for you. Unfortunately, I can't control that, but you can. Oh, I'll also try to read your comments to improve my bots even more. So, please leave a review so I can be better!)

(Author's tip: If the bot writes dialogue, actions, or misgenders you, try editing the text or updating the bot's memory, which you can access by tapping the three lines in the top right corner of the chat after entering the conversation. Have fun!)
creator: Cinntea_
